name: Dragon Wolf
description:
[collapse=OOC Info]
[b][big]Out Of Character information[/big][/b]
Below you can find sets of information I have found the need to express to those viewing my profile.

[collapse=Ignored?][justify]I often leave F-List chat open whilst doing many things. This often results in occasions where I am sent a private message by people looking to roleplay or simply talk, and seemingly "ignore" the user. If I do not reply within a reasonable amount of time and you cannot see me talking anywhere else on the site or its chatrooms, assume I am currently asleep and/or not at the computer. Trust me, it will probably save us both time in the end.

That said, I will make an honest attempt to log out of and/or close the F-List chat (or maybe even simply set myself to Idle) when I am not using it. But again, I may end up accidentally "ignoring" someone due to the fact that I am not able to reply at that point in time.[/justify][/collapse]
[/collapse]
[center][big]Preferred size[/big]
Wolf prefers to often be at sizes upwards of [b]half of a mile[/b] in height, or [b]2640feet[/b] tall, though she can possibly be any size at all.
This can often cause her problems when around other life forms, so she will shrink herself down to more manageable sizes if required.
[b][This is negotiable, and I am willing to change her size if necessary for a roleplay][/b]

[small]By default, she will be the size listed in this profile's [i]Info[/i] pane unless specified otherwise. The above is her personal preference, and will not have any impact on roleplay.[/small][/center]
[hr]
[b][big]Please note that this profile is still under construction, and is [i]nowhere near[/i] finished[/big][/b]

[heading]Character Information[hr][/heading]
[b][u]Description[/u][/b]
The first thing an observer would notice about Wolf is the sheer size of her body: Towering over observers at a total size of six foot eight, the large, red dragon already seems like a force to be reckoned with for most of those who cross her path. Getting a proper look at her, the first thing an onlooker would notice is her large, cyan-gold eyes glaring down at their form with a barely contained look of fury and power, before the ends of her sharp teeth catch their eye, her barely visible lips curled into a derisively amused smirk that seems to hold the attention as long as it can. The ivory white horns extending out of the sides of her head, along with the bony protrusions from the scales lining her neck and back serve only to draw even more attention to the sheer presence of this apex predator, giving those who even get a slight glance at her a sense of foreboding doom. The dragon's neck doesn't appear very long from the front, though a side view if an observer could even get one, would reveal that it is actually rather long; nearly three-quarters of her head in length, in fact, with bone lining the top of the length. This connects down to the main body, where bony protrusions can be seen running across her spine all the way down to her tail, the huge appendage being long enough to wrap all the way around her body and then some, the muscle running through it giving it the appearance of being just as strong as the rest of her form. Her leg joints also carry the same muscular look, which runs all the way down her rather toned legs to her feet; the appendages just as large and red as the rest of the body, three large toes protruding out, interconnected with webbing and ending in rather sharp claws that look like they were made specifically for tearing other creatures apart.

[hr]
[collapse=Copyright Disclaimer][justify][b][big]A copyright disclaimer that applies to the images used in this profile.[/big][/b]

I [b]do not[/b] own the images used in this profile, whether through being the original artist or having commissioned them myself. If the original artist comes across my profile and disagrees with my use of their images, drop me a note or send me a message over F-Chat and I will remove them as soon as possible.

Each image is attributed to their respective art and/or character owner(s) in the title text: hover over the image with the mouse or long-press on a mobile device to view the attribution.[/justify]
[/collapse]

infotags.12: 6' 8" height, 22' 3" length (from tail to neck. Ass to neck is 12' 1")
infotags.27: Varies, usually FF when in anthro form, non-existent when in feral form

Wolf, in her feral body. (Image: "Dragon's Lair" [(c) Anne Stokes, 2009-Present].)

memo.memo: So you can set a memo for yourself. Fun.
